name: Helm of the Tribune
description: Notes This helm provides the most DEF out of any helmet, while also providing 40 HP/MP. In order to permanently activate this helmet, you need a Magic Heal level of 76, as well as a maxed wisdom stat.
effects: On party: Berserk for 4.5 (+0.1 per WIS over 30) seconds On self: Speedy for 4 (+0.1 per WIS over 30) seconds
